landing.title: Sadaqah Jariyah
landing.subtitle: On behalf of the late (by Allah's will)
landing.name: Mohamed Elsayed
landing.dua: O Allah, forgive him and have mercy on him, keep him safe and sound, excuse him, honor his reception, and make his entrance wide. Wash him with water, snow, and hail.

home.title: Quran Ayah
home.description: Read and listen to random Quran verses with Arabic text, translation, tafsir, and recitation audio in a focused spiritual reflection experience.
home.allowAudio: Send peace upon Prophet Muhammad - Click to allow audio and start

dua.title: Supplications & Memorial for Mohamed Elsayed
dua.subtitle: Support with a sincere Dua for the late Mohamed Elsayed. Tapping 'Amen' acts as a continuous charity for him and registers your prayer.
dua.countLabel: You have prayed for him {{count}} times in this session
dua.toastDua: May Allah accept your supplication and forgive him
presetDuas: O Allah, forgive him and have mercy on him, keep him safe and sound, and excuse him.
O Allah, make his grave a garden from the gardens of Paradise and not a pit of Fire.
O Allah, make his record right, ease his account, and make his scales heavy with good deeds.
O Allah, admit him to Paradise without reckoning or prior punishment.
O Allah, gather us with him in the Gardens of Bliss with the Prophets, the Truthful, and the Martyrs.
